---
title: "Home"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="home-layout">

  <!-- LEFT: Bio -->
  <div class="home-left">
    <div class="hero-photo">
      <img src="bpMin.jpg" alt="Bladimir Padilla">
    </div>

    <h1>Bladimir Padilla</h1>
    <p class="subtitle">Graduate Student · PSQF · University of Iowa</p>

    <p>Hi,</p>

    <p>
      I am a graduate student in Educational Measurement and Statistics, broadly interested in
      multilevel and longitudinal analyses, psychometrics, and causal inference. My work sits at
      the intersection of educational outcomes and quantitative methods, with a particular focus
      on Chilean higher education.
    </p>

    <p>
      Before graduate school, I studied Social Work at the Universidad del Bio-Bio, Chile, and
      worked as a research assistant at the Centro de Investigación Educativa CIDCIE at the
      same university.
    </p>

    <p>
      I am currently working on multilevel and longitudinal analysis, causal inference designs, and meta-analysis in educational research.
    </p>

    <div class="section-title">Research Interests</div>
    <p>Multilevel Models · Longitudinal Analysis · Psychometrics · Causal Inference · Chilean Higher Education</p>

    <div class="section-title">News & Updates</div>
    <p><strong>News coming soon</strong>
<!---
    <p><strong>[Month Year]</strong> — [Update, e.g., paper accepted, conference presentation, fellowship awarded]</p>
    <p><strong>[Month Year]</strong> — [Update]</p> --->
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT: Contact Card -->
  <div class="home-right">
    <div class="contact-card">
      <!-- <img src="photo.jpg" alt="Bladimir Padilla" class="contact-photo">
      <div class="contact-name">Bladimir Padilla</div>
      <div class="contact-role">Graduate Student</div>
      <div class="contact-dept">Psychological & Quantitative Foundations</div>
      <div class="contact-uni">University of Iowa</div> -->
      <div class="contact-name">Contact Information</div>

      <hr class="contact-divider">

      <ul class="contact-list">
        <li>
          <span class="contact-icon">✉</span>
          <a href="mailto:gbpadilla@uiowa.edu">gbpadilla@uiowa.edu</a>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="contact-icon">✉</span>
          <a href="mailto:gpadilla@ubiobio.cl">gpadilla@ubiobio.cl</a>
        </li>
      </ul>

      <hr class="contact-divider">

      <div class="contact-links">
        <a href="https://github.com/Bladimir-PF" target="_blank" title="GitHub">
          <i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/bladimir-padilla/" target="_blank" title="LinkedIn">
          <i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn
        </a>
        <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=yNsLTlwAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" title="Google Scholar">
          <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Scholar
        </a>
        <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Bladimir-Padilla-2" target="_blank" title="ResearchGate">
          <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> ResearchGate
        </a>
        <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0003-0882-1818" target="_blank" title="ORCID">
          iD ORCID
        </a>
      </div>

      <hr class="contact-divider">

      <a href="academicCV.pdf" class="cv-button">⬇ Download CV</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
